attributes.title: Open Discover for field sidebar
attributes.visState:
{"title":"Open Discover for field sidebar","type":"markdown","params":{"fontSize":12,"openLinksInNewTab":false,"markdown":"## Use Discover for filters (Logz.io-style left panel)

[**Open Logs / Signal**](/app/data-explorer/discover/#/?_g=(filters:!(),refreshInterval:(pause:!f,value:30000),time:(from:now-15m,to:now))&_a=(discover:(columns:!(resource.attributes.k8s@namespace@name,serviceName,observedTimestamp,severityText,log.attributes.event_class,log.attributes.event_category,log.attributes.has_trace,body),interval:auto,sort:!(!(observedTimestamp,desc))),metadata:(indexPattern:shared-observability-logs,view:discover))&_q=(filters:!(),query:(language:lucene,query:'%28log.attributes.event_class%3Aapplication%29%20OR%20%28NOT%20log.attributes.event_class%3A*%20AND%20NOT%20log.attributes.event_category%3A%20%28%22epoll_io%22%20OR%20%22runtime_metrics%22%29%20AND%20NOT%20body%3A%20%28*epoll%20select*%29%20AND%20NOT%20body%3A%20%22Memory%20statistics%22%29'))) — default triage view.

### Filter order
1. **namespace** (`resource.attributes.k8s@namespace@name`: `loadlinker` / `sesame-idam` / `rerp`)
2. **application** (`serviceName`)
3. **time** (picker, top right)
4. **event_class** / **event_category** (signal vs runtime noise)

### Saved searches (Discover → Open)
- **Logs / Signal** — application logs only (`event_class:application`)
- **Logs / Errors** — WARN+ within signal
- **Logs / Auth** — `sesame-idam` signal
- **Logs / BFF** — `loadlinker` + `bff` signal
- **Logs / Runtime noise** — epoll + memory stats (`event_class:runtime_noise`) — select *for* trash, not mixed with triage

Runtime I/O lines (`add/del/mod fd … epoll select`) stay indexed; they are tagged, not deleted."},"aggs":[]}

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"(log.attributes.event_class:application) OR (NOT log.attributes.event_class:* AND NOT log.attributes.event_category: (\"epoll_io\" OR \"runtime_metrics\") AND NOT body: (*epoll select*) AND NOT body: \"Memory statistics\")","language":"lucene"},"filter":[{"$state":{"store":"appState"},"meta":{"alias":"Hide runtime noise (epoll + memory)","disabled":false,"index":"shared-observability-logs","key":"log.attributes.event_class","negate":true,"type":"phrase","params":{"query":"runtime_noise"}},"query":{"match_phrase":{"log.attributes.event_class":"runtime_noise"}}},{"$state":{"store":"appState"},"meta":{"alias":"Hide untagged epoll lines","disabled":false,"index":"shared-observability-logs","key":"body","negate":true,"type":"custom"},"query":{"wildcard":{"body.keyword":"*epoll select*"}}}],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.title: Logs
attributes.description: Companion overview. Open Discover for the field sidebar and saved searches (Signal / Errors / Auth / BFF / Runtime noise). Epoll and memory lines are tagged event_class:runtime_noise — hidden by default, selectable when needed. Managed by shared-gitops-k8s-cluster
